purpose: Record an additional France month API/ICS/PDF search pass for PR-130. This file is not a calendar input.

source_rechecks.result: Official FNCH calendar page confirms period controls including Aujourd'hui, Cette semaine, and Ce mois-ci, and provides table columns for day, date, start time, hippodrome, discipline, federation, audience, and CSI. The captured page still only exposes 2026-06-02 rows, and no safe captured parameter/API/ICS endpoint exposing complete June 2026 rows was found during this pass.

France Galop calendar subscription page confirms free calendar subscription choices for all France, federation, and racecourse, but the captured HTML does not expose a usable ICS/API URL or complete June 2026 meeting rows.

Additional searches for LeTROT calendrier-resultats/API/month endpoints did not capture a complete official June 2026 meeting_date + racecourse row set. Known GNT snippets remain partial and are not promoted.

promotion_status.reason: France still lacks a captured official full-month row source. FNCH daily rows and France Galop subscription UI are promising acquisition routes, but they are not sufficient calendar inputs until complete June 2026 rows are captured.

next_steps: Use a browser/devtools or Codex task to inspect FNCH Ce mois-ci network requests if connector capture remains daily-only.
Inspect France Galop calendar subscription network calls for generated ICS URLs.
Search official LeTROT calendar-resultats endpoints by date/month outside the GNT feature pages.
